scroll_found.title: Research the Ice Fire Spells scroll at a Research Pedestal

dragon_eye.title: Obtain a Dragon Eye (Ice & Fire — drop from corresponding dragon type, used in End Remastered portal)

subtitle.text: The Ice Dragon drops 10% of the time. The Fire Dragon drops 10% of the time. The Lightning Dragon drops 10%. Kill all three.

description: CH.09 · ICE & FIRE SPELLS
▸ Ice & Fire adds three dragon species.
Each one drops a spell scroll at 10%.
Each one also drops an Eye variant.
The Eye Hunt and the Spell Hunt are the same hunt.
◈ ICE & FIRE DRAGON TYPES
└ ✦ Fire Dragon: spawns in hot/desert biomes
Stages 1-5 (1 = small, 5 = massive)
Stage 5 fire dragon = raid-tier encounter
Drops: Fire Dragon Scales (armor), Dragon Blood,
Fire Dragon Skull, Ice & Fire Spells scroll (10%)
└ ✦ Ice Dragon: spawns in cold/tundra biomes
Similar stage system to Fire
Drops: Ice Dragon Scales, Freeze Blood,
Ice Dragon Skull, Ice & Fire Spells scroll (10%)
└ ✦ Lightning Dragon: rarer, mountable once tamed
Spawns in mountain/highland biomes
Drops: Lightning Dragon Scales, Shock abilities
◈ ▲ KNOWN BUG
└ Cockatrice: the spawn egg crashes the game
└ DO NOT use Cockatrice spawn egg in any context
└ The mob itself is safe to fight in the world
└ The Eye Hunt has an alternative for its eye
◈ END REMASTERED EYES FROM DRAGONS
└ Ice Dragon → Eye of the Cold (custom eye)
└ Fire Dragon → standard eye drop recipe
└ Lightning Dragon → Eye of the Rogue variant
└ All eyes needed for the 9+3 portal setup
◈ SCROLL: Ice & Fire Spells
└ 10% drop from each dragon type
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: dragon spell school (dragon-specific ISS),
dragon item knowledge
▶ Find The Ice & Fire Spells scroll [check]
▶ Obtain a Dragon Eye [check]
◇ Dragon Armor (Ice & Fire scales): crafted from
the scales of the corresponding dragon.
Best pre-End armor in terms of raw protection.
